title: neonauclea purpurea
intro: Neonauclea purpurea, also known as purple nauclea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neonauclea purpurea include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
